id__in.description: Multiple values may be separated by commas.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

order_by.description:
Ordering

* `created_at` - Created At
* `-created_at` - Created At (descending)
* `updated_at` - Updated At
* `-updated_at` - Updated At (descending)
* `name` - Name
* `-name` - Name (descending)
